task_completion.description: Locate and expand the WorldInfo node in the Webots interface or text editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Webots Scene Tree shows the 'WorldInfo' node selected/expanded, or a text editor is open to the 'WorldInfo' section of the .wbt file.

task_completion.description: Set the global cfm and erp values in the WorldInfo node.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Field Editor or text editor shows 'cfm' set to 0.005 and 'erp' set to 0.4 within the WorldInfo node.

task_completion.description: Set the linear and angular damping in the defaultDamping node.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'defaultDamping' node (a Damping node under WorldInfo) shows 'linear' set to 0.2 and 'angular' set to 0.2.

task_completion.description: Set the softCFM value for the cardboard ContactProperties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under WorldInfo -> contactProperties, the ContactProperties node associated with cardboard shows 'softCFM' set to 0.001.

task_completion.description: Save the modified world to the specified Desktop path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save World As' dialog in Webots or a file manager/terminal confirms the file is saved as 'stabilized_pallet.wbt' in '/home/ga/Desktop/'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Webots GUI or a legitimate text editor to modify the simulation parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Webots application interface or a text editor like nano/gedit/VSCode being actively used, rather than just terminal echo commands.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered or configured the physics values in the appropriate fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The specific values (0.005, 0.4, 0.2, 0.001) are visible in the Webots Field Editor or text editor interface, not just printed to a terminal output.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file properly through the application or editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Webots 'Save As' menu or text editor save commands are visible, indicating a genuine file creation process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected parameters to be set in the Webots world are: global 'cfm' = 0.005, global 'erp' = 0.4, 'defaultDamping' linear = 0.2, 'defaultDamping' angular = 0.2, and 'softCFM' for the cardboard ContactProperties = 0.001. The final modified world must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/Desktop/stabilized_pallet.wbt'.
